case_title: RIMA ABDELKHALEK VS. KAREN M. HORTON MD

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABDELKHALEK, RIMA (KHALEK) ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (IFP: $0.00) SERVED OCT-02-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HORTON MD, KAREN M.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-19-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ABDELKHALEK, RIMA (KHALEK) IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HORTON MD, KAREN M. A MEDICAL MALPRACTICE CLAIM GENERALLY REQUIRES EXPERT TESTIMONY. HERE THERE IS NO BASIS GROUNDED IN EXPERTISE OR ANYTHING THAT THE LAW ALLOWS ME TO CREDIT FOR ME TO FIND PROFESSIONAL NEGLIGENCE. I CREDIT DEFENDANT'S TESTIMONY THAT FAT CELLS DO NOT PRESENT CONSISTENTLY IN BREAST TISSUE AFTER THEY ARE MOVED TO BREAST TISSUE AND PLAINTIFF'S TESTIMONY DOES NOT CALL THAT INTO QUESTION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-19-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-19-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF RIMA ABDELKHALEK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KAREN M. HORTON MD IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ABDELKHALEK, RIMA (KHALEK) AS TO DEFENDANT HORTON MD, KAREN M. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-19-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
